tofucraft.tofu_book.tooltip2: If you want see this book. put the Patchouli mod!
tofucraft.tofu_crafters_book.about_anoth:
The tofu you can make in the Nether is a bit special, and cannot be solidified with normal bittern.

 You need to collect the bittern ingredients to solidify it. You can collect shroomlights found in the Crimson Forest and Warped Forest by right-clicking on them with a bottle.

 From there, you can craft them with the corresponding Nether mushrooms to get a bottle of Crimson Liquid or a bottle of Warped Liquid.

 Crimson Bottles can be used to solidify Soul Tofu. Warped Bottles can be used to solidify Hell Tofu.
tofucraft.tofu_crafters_book.about_bitte:
This item can be obtained as a by-product of salt furnaces and salt fields.

 It would take a long time to explain how it works, but basically it's an item used to harden tofu.
tofucraft.tofu_crafters_book.antenna_bas:
The Antenna Basic is necessary to send TF Force energy to other TF Force-handling machines.
 You need to put those antenna on Generator like TF Storage
tofucraft.tofu_crafters_book.author: Author: Tofunian
tofucraft.tofu_crafters_book.before_the_:
To make tofu, soybeans alone are not enough. You need a container to put the soy milk in and an item to solidify the soy milk and turn it into tofu.

Sure, you can bottle it and drink it, but making tofu requires additional steps.
tofucraft.tofu_crafters_book.introductio:
Howdy! I'm literary Tofunian(Kinda)! This time I'd like to tell you about the appeal of tofu. What? Did tofu even exist in the first place?

 ...Don't worry! I'm not going to tell you a lie like it's bad poisonous potatoes(He...got too carried away on April Fool's Day). If you keep destroying a lot of grass, something called soybeans should come out!
tofucraft.tofu_crafters_book.once_tofu_m:
Once Tofu Made by Bittern. you can now get tofu!

 ... did you know the tofu can harden? If you sandwich tofu between two stones(don't do that with kinu tofu). tofu will more harder!

 I think You cannot believed about it, but Once harden the tofu.... It can use to tool and armor
tofucraft.tofu_crafters_book.soymilk.des:
Another thing is that soy milk is more effective if you drink it regularly. If you drink it every day,

 you will get additional benefits, so please give it a try. Of course, you can also try other soy milks.
tofucraft.tofu_crafters_book.soysauce.de:
First. need to craft Kouji Base.

 after crafted, you need to wait KoujiBase turn to Kouji in your inventory. It will take long time. so I recommend inventory management with bundle.

 (Do not put koji seeds in your bundle or chest. You should hold in Inventory).

After Kouji is made. You can Craft Miso Barrel, and place under the Stone and wait for it... 

 If changed color. use bottle and pick soy sauce. and You can break the Barrel and Miso is done!
tofucraft.tofu_crafters_book.tf_force.de:
You can also industrialize using tofu and soybeans.

 The main source of energy is soybeans and tofu,
 which can be used to bake things and restore the durability of tofu tools.
Tofu storage generates energy mainly from soybeans,
 which is used to restore and charge tofu tools.
tofucraft.tofu_crafters_book.title: Tofu Crafters Book
When you use a Tofu Stick with grilled tofu on it, like a Nether portal, it opens a portal that takes you to our home, Tofuworld.

 Tofu World's technology advanced thanks to its connection with the Overworld, but it seems to have been sealed off by a tragedy from long ago.
tooltip.tofucraft.soyball: Use Self to Repair Tofu Armor or Tool
